summary: Strong set featuring tasty jams (Crazy/High Time, Hell/Don’t Ease, Love Light) captured on a good‑depth recording that’s slightly tinnier than ideal.
review: The show delivers near‑top playing throughout, highlighted by a sweet Crazy → High Time combo, a rocking Hell → Don’t Ease Me In, an inspired Stranger into Eyes segue, and a rollicking Love Light that would make Pigpen proud, ending with a lovely Baby Blue encore. The recording is deep and listenable, though it carries a faint tinny sheen and a modest bass roll‑off that can be corrected with EQ.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed positive review notes excellent musical performance (≈70% weight) and only minor recording quirks (≈30% weight), leading to a rating close to the reviewer’s own 4‑star score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Slight shade of tinniness and minor bass loss; overall depth is strong and can be improved with EQ.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Smooth set‑to‑set flow with a jam‑heavy second set and seamless segues (e.g., Stranger → Eyes) that keep the energy high.
